review_title: Cost effictive and powerful SMB risk awareness platform.
description: Very positive. The team were easy to work with. Implementation was basically self serve. There are new features added regualrly. Support is responsive and the cost is incredible value.
author: Robert D.
pros: The initial risk survey. It creates a profile for each user and then works on upskilling where they are weak. Its a true set and forget. all i need to do is add the user to the software and assign the inital survey and then i do not need to look at them again ever as the system takes over.
cons: it doesnt handle multiple companies well. I have two comanies and theres an admin user workaround thats a little clunky. should be easier to create and manage multiple branding/email templates

review_title: Great product with a great price tag
description: Great platform. Easy to use, quick to setup and has a great price point. Support is always very quick to reply (often less than 1min through the chat - and it's a real person not a robot!). I have not found a product that ticks all the boxes like uSecure.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: * Phishing simulators with the ability to make custom campaigns. * Phishing reporting button integration for Outlook. * Automated enrollment via Office 365 and automated phishing/training courses
cons: * No ability to export metrics as PDF * Would like an API to interact with. * Some actions that I would expect be available from the uPhish/uLearn admin pages are only accessible as an context menu item in the Users page.

author: Joshua C.
pros: refreshes users n the courses often course are easy to do but easy to remember also
cons: integrating with new users through microsoft so we dont have to add them

description: We switched to usecure from KnowBe4 and our response from our current clients have been very positive. We include usecure as a part of our offering and that is a differentiator in our market. We are also using this as a tool to get new customers for our business as well as usecure. We've also worked very closely with Nihil on development and it's great to have a partner that is open to feedback and implements changes.
author: lauren L.
pros: Training is simple and easy to understand, making it more impactful. We also like that it provides other tools to help our clients understand/manage their cyber security using the breach scans and policy management.
cons: I'd like to see more features of MSP Management to be able to track participating and scores from a higher level rather than having to log into each company.

description: We use uSecure to deliver regular User Awareness training to our users and also to run Phishing campaigns.
author: Nigel L.
pros: The ease of use an clear reporting make uSecure a standout product in comparison to other products. Even so it still delivers a lot of great features
cons: Some more detailed reporting needs to be dropped out to Excel to achieve. However there are easy to use build in export tools to achieve this with.

description: It takes advantage of its time-saving automation, lightning-fast deployment, and easy onboarding of handheld devices
author: Steven M.
pros: Usecure has offered an automated cybersecurity training program that has been easy to implement and can be adapted to the needs of each user. With its cloud-based setup, seamless integrations, and portable onboarding, usecure is a tool to help identify and address security knowledge gaps.
cons: Based on the experience received with the daily use of usecure I do not find anything that I dislike.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: An easy-to-use package that has some unique features that are a key differentiator. The darknet monitoring and the policy features. The risk report is first class!
cons: The reporting is comprehensive, but looking forward to the updates that will ensure the graphics stand out more and are easier to read.

description: Highly recommend the platform and available in some many languages
author: Ludovic A.
pros: End user really like it, I’ve been using Usecure from a previous employment and highly recommended to my new work place.
cons: The reporting could be better but I assume they will improve this part of it .

author: Judy N.
pros: Ease on training all employees and recruits on any emerging or evolving cyber insecurities .Custom stimulation phishing.
cons: Nothing to say less, it meets all it was developed for.

review_title: Best User Awareness and Training Product We Have
author: Adam L.
pros: Enjoyable bite sized videos are used to relay important and impactful training.
cons: I wish I could think of some cons but none come to mind.

review_title: Straight forward easy to adopt LMS
author: Chadi K.
pros: it is an easy to position LMS platform. it has a lot of added value, especially when you need to add out of box contents. user friendly, and the courses deliver enough information in a very little time. other add-on features like policy management and phishing campaigns expand the coverage of this platform
cons: the new enhanced training delivery (video) needs to have more enhancement. A lot of information that were on the original slides are now missed out, thus some of the questions at the end of the training are not covered in the video.

review_title: Review from a reseller of uSecure
description: It has become part of our portfolio of SAT solutions with its USP of the simplicity of deployment and management.
author: Jonathan R.
pros: We selected uSecure because of its simplicity, other security awareness training solutions we do have become overcomplicated and overloaded with content. The evaluation, trial and deployment process is great!
cons: At the moment additional reporting options are critical to allow us to demonstrate the power of the solution and what it is doing for customers.

description: The support is very quick, and very helpful using their chat facility. I was genuinely surprised at how engaged our users are with the content. It's been a great investment. It's a major part of our onboarding process for new users.. who we can see definitely are in need of the training.
author: Colin T.
pros: Our colleagues seem to actually enjoy the training, and indulge in some inter-departmental competition too.
cons: We do have a Polish department (following a recent acquisition), and the ones with poor English would benefit if they could use is more for training

author: Kevin M.
pros: The customisation, quality, customer support
cons: Not really anything, its all fairly simple to use.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Why you should get this product
description: Absolutely blown away with the amazing customer service from [SENSITIVE CONTENT] ! He has been very patient with demanding schedule and has gone above and beyond to thoroughly explain all of USecure's features. Considering I work with so many different vendors, I am used to customer support to well...doesn't exist. It's nice to finally work with someone that is friendly, quick to respond, and actually knows their software.
author: Patrick T.
pros: Great user interface! So many different tools but the human risk report alone would make me get this software. Anyone considering this USecure should demo their human risk report and I promise you'll sign up right then and there. Also I've been dealing with so many different types of policies so I was blown away to find out they also provide templates and a UPolicy builder.
cons: At this point and time I haven't found anything to be a con so I can't comment on anything but If I find something then I am the type to immediately present it to the software vendor.

author: Jonathon A.
pros: We use the software to help with tailoring the training to our users. It allows us to carry on with other jobs and let the software supply the training and we can review the results later.
cons: I would like to see some more automated reports but the reports that can be made are very good.

review_title: uSecure gives MSPs a great Security Awareness Training product for clients
description: uSecure's B2B account management and support have been excellent, ensuring we're familiar with the product and features and answer questions quickly so we can become masters of the system before delivering to our clients.
author: Alex G.
pros: Intuitive and easy to use, an amazing array of sales and technical guides for MSPs, simple and engaging for end users often found to be in surprising need of Security Awareness Training.
cons: As at March 2022, reporting needs a little more development (this is underway) - automating/exporting pretty PDF reports for clients is the final piece of the puzzle. Dashboard reports on the web UI are great for now!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Does what it says well - Love the support and documenting which is easy to understand.
author: Greg F.
pros: uPhish is a great safe way to test users and keep them on their toes with regards to phishing attempts.
cons: More reports would be great - There are ways to get the reports you need, but a quicker way would be great. I beleive reports will be added with time.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to use phishing and training program
author: Robin V.
pros: The integration was not easy but that's a microsoft issue, they make it way to hard to add the mails. I love the system how it is. It's very easy to use.
cons: MAybe when they fall for the phising mail that they are automatically redirected to the training platform
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Très bonne l'accompagnement est très bien, il est suivi ...
author: Cheick T.
pros: La facilité d'utilisation de l'outil, l'intégration.
cons: Je ne vois pas encore pour le moment les intégrations se font chaque mois ce qui est très bien on a toujours des nouveautés à présenter à nos clients.

review_title: A Good software to free your admin and IT time
author: Chris M.
pros: Ease of use, extensive library of policies.
cons: While overall the price is good, it could bring more value if the price was a bit lower.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Low Cost Cyber Security Training Without Compromise on Quality
description: Overall we can deliver a professional branded service to our staff and clients. The platform is quick to understand and easy to use.
author: David S.
pros: Love the customisations that you can do, you can white label all the important parts keeping company brand where needed. The cost is low but the service and quality of the platform is equal to, if not exceeds more expensive solutions available. The service and support team are quick to assist with any issues and rectification times are fast.
cons: Haven't really come across anything that's a con although I would say this is aimed more at SMB's than Enterprise.

review_title: Great bit of software to keep our users learning
description: Very good investment, keeps our users thinking about what could happen if they were careless, and how to not be careless.
author: Adam P.
pros: We do get feedback from our users that they have learned something new - which is great. The software is good at prioritising the correct courses if a user has a 'weak' point in their knowledge.
cons: The questions quite often relate to working in coffee shops and remote working, whereas these do not often apply to our users. It would be good if we could choose the "type" of user as they don't enjoy answering questions that don't and won't ever apply to them.

review_title: Cross-organisational development tool that provides excellent value
description: Sound company to do business with. Always there to support if custom or bespoke changes needed.
author: Phil S.
pros: Very easy to set up, with powerful course-completion reports, confidence in the quality of the courses and phishing testing.
cons: Nothing we can think of at the price point offered.

author: Tim J.
pros: What I like most about the service is that is straightforward to setup, use and administer while still providing an excellent set of human risk management tools that is continually improving.
cons: It would good to have the ability for delegated administrators to provide administration to a subset of users without giving admin access to all.
